overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a dimly lit natural history museum. The character walks past large creature skeletons mounted on wooden walls and display platforms in a cinematic, atmospheric environment with warm artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: museum corridor with vertical skeletal display

agents.ego_description: walking slowly past the tall vertical skeleton mounted on the wooden wall, observing the exhibit

entered.detail: tall vertical creature ribcage and spine mounted on the wooden wall
warm-toned wooden panels forming the museum wall background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow museum corridor, passing a tall vertical creature skeleton mounted on wooden paneling. Warm artificial lighting illuminates the exhibit as the camera follows from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: museum platform area with large skeletal exhibit

events.description: moving from the vertical wall-mounted skeleton to the large platform-mounted skeleton exhibit

agents.ego_description: continuing forward to examine the large skeleton displayed on the raised platform

entered.detail: large quadruped skeleton with ribcage and skull displayed on a raised platform
raised metal and wood platform supporting the large skeleton exhibit

segments.scene_description: Moving past the vertical skeleton, the character approaches a large animal skeleton displayed on a raised platform. The scene transitions to focus on the new exhibit as the previous one falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: museum stairwell area with metal railings

agents.ego_description: walking toward the metal stair railing while passing the large platform skeleton

entered.detail: metal railing structure with horizontal bars indicating a stairway or upper level

segments.scene_description: The character continues past the platform exhibit toward a metal stair railing visible on the right. The large skeleton recedes into the background as the character explores deeper into the museum space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit museum corridor that transitions from a narrow walkway into a more expansive exhibit space. It begins by following the character from behind as they pass a tall vertical creature skeleton mounted against warm wooden paneling. As the character moves forward, the camera shifts focus away from the wall and toward a large animal skeleton displayed on a raised platform. The scene then opens further as the character continues past the platform, allowing the large skeleton to recede into the background. Finally, the camera tracks the character deeper into the museum toward a metal stair railing visible on the right.
